title: Binomial Distribution Flowchart
description: A visual guide to the properties, formulas, and applications of the Binomial Distribution, showing how mean and variance are derived.
elements: Conditions: Fixed n, Independent trials, Two outcomes (success/failure)
Example Scenario (e.g., coin flips, pass/fail tests)
relationships: The experiment parameters define the PMF
The PMF formula is used to calculate probabilities
The mean and variance are derived directly from n and p
Mean indicates expected number of successes
Variance measures spread around the mean
